title: Terms of Service | Dory's Cleaning Services
description: Terms of service for Dory's Cleaning Services in Massachusetts. Service agreements, policies, and conditions for healthcare facility cleaning. Call (978) 307-8107.
aiSummary: Dory's Cleaning Services Inc. is a Massachusetts-based commercial healthcare facility cleaning company with more than 22 years of hands-on clinical experience. We serve 109 cities across Massachusetts, providing CDC and OSHA compliant environmental cleaning for medical offices, specialty clinics (cardiology, dental, urgent care, dialysis), ambulatory and outpatient facilities, surgery centers, rehabilitation and nursing facilities, assisted living, and healthcare administrative offices. Founded by Jeneva Thomas, $2,000,000 liability insurance. Services include infection control, ATP testing, terminal cleaning, COVID disinfection, biohazard cleanup, and 24/7 emergency response. Contact: (978) 307-8107 — based in Marlborough, MA 01752.

twitterTitle: Terms of Service | Dory's Cleaning Services
mainHtml:
Terms of Service

Service agreement and policies

Last updated: January 2025

Agreement to Terms

By engaging Dory's Cleaning Services Inc. ("we," "us," or "our") for healthcare facility cleaning services, you agree to these Terms of Service. Please read them carefully before scheduling a service.

Services

We provide professional healthcare facility cleaning services including:

  • Healthcare for medical offices
  • Clinic and outpatient facility sanitation
  • Assisted living and senior care cleaning
  • Infection control and high-touch disinfection
  • Compliance documentation and scheduled sanitation

Specific services, pricing, and schedules are agreed upon before service begins.

Scheduling and Cancellations

  • Appointments should be scheduled in advance
  • We request at least 24 hours notice for cancellations
  • Repeated no-shows or late cancellations may result in a cancellation fee
  • We will make every effort to accommodate rescheduling requests

Access to Premises

You are responsible for:

  • Providing safe and reasonable access to the service area
  • Ensuring all necessary areas are accessible during scheduled service hours
  • Securing sensitive patient records and protected health information per HIPAA requirements
  • Informing us of any biohazards, special protocols, or facility-specific considerations

Payment Terms

  • Payment is due upon completion of service unless otherwise agreed
  • We accept cash, check, and major credit cards
  • Prices are as quoted and may be adjusted for additional services requested
  • For recurring services, billing arrangements will be discussed in advance

Satisfaction Guarantee

We strive for complete customer satisfaction. If you are not satisfied with any aspect of our service:

  • Contact us within 24 hours of service completion
  • We will return to address any concerns at no additional charge
  • We value your feedback and use it to improve our services

Liability and Insurance

Dory's Cleaning Services Inc. is fully insured with $2,000,000 in liability coverage. We take every precaution to prevent damage, but in the unlikely event of accidental damage:

  • Report any damage within 24 hours
  • We will assess and address claims promptly
  • We are not liable for pre-existing damage or normal wear

License Information

We are licensed by the Commonwealth of Massachusetts:

  • Commercial Cleaning Services License — Licensed & Insured in Massachusetts

Contact Us

For questions about these Terms of Service:

  • Phone: (978) 307-8107
  • Email: contact@doryscleaningservices.com

Changes to Terms

We reserve the right to update these terms at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.
